Today might be the only day in a whilee where i probably wont play anything

Ascension to Valor is a new challenge that has been made for me by my friends featuring 100 different tasks in various games for me to complete, to spice things up theres a twist where I do not know what the games in the challenge are, I can only see the current game I am playing, and when I beat one, the next is revealed to me. https://shorturl.at/3cINc
i ended up getting to the first boss wahoo
though getting to the first boss did take two hours
I've had the k2w big kid stage song completely stuck in my head for like the last 3 days
The guy proves to be the hardest boss again 😔
and then played the first boss for like ten mins and couldnt pass the first attack and was like yknow what im not doing this
Is there an Alarm sound? XD
but yeah i dont think ill be making it to the second stage
who is the ai? is it k…ai?
I just had that cold sweat type of waking up moment
I had the yume nikki block world song as my wake up alarm for a while
mine is just vibration as well
either that or just waking up on time
imagine just waking up on time
thank god max is awake for the stream
2 mins to reach what took me an hour to get to bleh
but me playing the game made someone else play it too and they also got to the first boss in 20 mins instead of my 2h
so i just get to feel bad regardless :3
dw nameless i also get to compare to max/pluto crushing it vs my replay
@Naloas i mean compared to me youre also crushing it so like :3
@nameless_iw exactly, we all have our bigger fish
and vice versa, there's always a smaller fish you don't realise is there
true but my mindset with these things is just terrible ig
@nameless_iw Just keep playing is all i can say
like i practically stopped playing fangames because of these things
i like and dislike each stage having a theme
yeah i'm just playing games cause they're fun
it's def easy to get depressed over others being better but that'll be the case for any game i can play
problem is when none of them are fun
even better as it's a stage 5 100% run
i mean really sudalv tas'd the game for the 1.0 release
the reason i havent yet is that its a gms game
@Naloas i meant like an optimized tas
well apparently someone is for fasf
thats what ghost said when i was playing recently
wait someone is tasing the game or what?
thats why i wasn't sure if you were foreshadowing lol
(please let it actually be optimized so i dont feel like i have to imoprove the tas)
don't get tilted, it's fine if mistakes happen
like if i can see certain time loss then i will be upset
Again... what's the energy really for?
@MaxiPT For the extra content in the game
well we know the double upward plane isnt gonna be an issue this time :3c
but yeah ive been wanting to see an optimized tas of this game for a while
i think this is one of the first games i looked at funnily enough
only issue at the time was that its not a gm8 game
surely gonna look into libtas eventually
after playing see the moon i'm really interested in an optimised tas of that
surprised how fast it already is
if the game isnt too long could look at it sometime
despite how much there is in that game
i mean i dont know the game but that doesnt sound very short
it feels short considering how much it has
probably way easier to optimize than the big project though
it's not a hard game in general, but i def get it wouldn't be a quick tas
is see the moon a linear game=
nah it's got a split path section at the start, although i'd say the route is pretty clear still
ok nvm i dont know this one
damn, see the moon is a classic
insane start to a run huh
really looking like sub 4 pace right now
well at least my estimate is 20 mins so theyre just gonna quickly kick me off if im too slow
@Naloas i assume there arent any like big skips or anything?
might have to check a playthrough of the game or smth
there's one funny 2 screen skip where you just stand on a platform in the right spot, but otherwise nothing currently known
wr doesn't do that one but my current time (not highlighted yet) does it thanks to skull finding it in jetys run
i really thought you killed yourself there
yeah i've zero clue how that skip works
you stand on a platform, get moved into a block, then it warps you to the top of the gmk room
@Naloas oh huh id have to test if that one works correctly on emu

i mean i do have friends but they break everything lol
Scared the shi out of me 😭

how is everything happening during this run
i've had that rng and it has killed me every time

you always miss it by a pixel
you don't need to trigger the spike before save 3 before going under
failed to dodge the lag trap
oh you don't do the og k2 full jump setup for this
might have to be okay with 10th try
After this run you HAVE to check music 126 channel

yeah i'd be very impressed if you code a way to avoid all of those

ok not bad run, go next

a lot of runs is a requirement, not a suggestion

practicing bottomless abyss will make you better at gravity man

i def was not watching every k3 stream back then
i'm still not now, but i wasn't back then either
yeah I was worse way older than that ngl

and that makes you the true victor

unless youre some buddhist monk i feel like a bit of tilt is expected during these kind of runs

cause yeah seeing the + time on my first few runs was tilting as heck
If i speedrun eventually i will for sure have the splits off my screen
From my experience it ruins my mental quick if i feel behind
nah mild difficulty has the issue of not being allowed to die when you want to do well lol
Plutos cn2.5 speedrun seemed pretty chill
i already register every tiny mistake i can tell i make as is, speedrunning makes those actually have an impact which i don't like
at least with hard challenges i can make a mistake and go "ok realistically this doesn't actually matter that much"
yeah cause there's no clear screen for a speedrun
yeah i've never known how mario or zelda runners manage to do it for so long
Tbf fangames are probably the worst games to speedrun

dude that p4 was so free compared to some
he didn't kill you from the grave this time

that final split on k3 gravityman really making sense right now

Every death is just really frustrating
i miss these games sm ngl i need to get back into them
theres a lot of easy places to recommend games if you need anything d3
